title: Chopper's Delight
description: An add-on for Farmer's Delight adding Cutting Boards for all wood types, which can be decorated with banners. Includes compatibility with Every Compat, Biomes O' Plenty and Oh The Biomes You'll Go.
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1339974/description_40f854f8-4989-4604-b937-d96a3e90dbb2.png)

## About

**Chopper's Delight** is an add-on for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) that adds a variety of new **Cutting Boards**, each crafted from different wood types - including compatibility with popular mods like [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) - bringing even more personalization to your Minecraft kitchen!

[Join the Discord server](https://discord.gg/zHYkT85E6p) **to stay ahead with the latest updates and get exclusive sneak peeks!**

**I'm still actively developing this mod, so stay tuned for more features!**

## Features

### 🪵 Cutting Boards for every wood type

Craft a **Cutting Board** out of every wood type in Minecraft—perfect for adding that extra touch of style when decorating your Minecraft kitchen!

This includes compatibility for the following world-gen mods:

*   Biomes O' Plenty
*   Oh The Biomes We've Gone

### 📜️ Banner patterns

Decorate your **Cutting Board** with **Banner** patterns, giving it a personal touch. Your design is applied to one half of the board, the other half will keep the wooden look.

## My other mods

[![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ecede4d7053895d6f424894b35007d35a5b883b.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight)

Check out my other popular [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) add-on, [Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight)! This mod adds Cotton, Coffee, Bell Peppers, fried foods and more!

## Support

If you like my mod and want to support me on my Minecraft modding journey, consider ☕ [buying me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/phantomwing)!
